title: Monday API
excerpt: We have some complex data transformation logics and the same cannot be achieved using Monday automation recipe. Therefore, we are looking into an alternative option to write the logic in any programming and host the code…

posts.author: somnadas (Somnath Das)
posts.cookedHtml: We have some complex data transformation logics and the same cannot be achieved using Monday automation recipe. Therefore, we are looking into an alternative option to write the logic in any programming and host the code in Monday.com so that it is up and running 24/7 and when a state of a record changes then automatically triggers the execution of defined logic. It seems that most of the operation/Configuration or automation can also be achieved using Monday API. Is it possible to host logics in the application(not automation recipe)? I very new to Monday.com and figuring out the features available.

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @somnadas
Welcome to the community and to monday.com as well.

Your question has been sent to the tech team, so you will receive an answer soon.
Mean while, have a nice day

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @somnadas,

This is not possible yet but we are working on something that might be interesting for you.

If you would like more information about it, please let me know and I will ask someone to send you an email with more information to your email address.

Let me know!

Cheers,
Matias
